validation.command: node --check src/cli.js; node --check src/global-runtime.js; node --check src/control-plane/inspect.js; node --test test/control-plane-ownership.test.js; node --test test/inspect-cli.test.js
validation.summary: Syntax checks passed; ownership tests passed 4/4; inspect CLI tests passed 6/6.

controllerChecks: launchdeck inspect dispatch is wired through the CLI and global-runtime facade.
inspect-port compatibility is preserved alongside unified inspect.
External and unknown listeners remain inspect-only; no external kill or stop action is introduced.
JSON envelope compatibility and next-action surfaces remain covered by focused tests.
A stale test runtime lock from a prior timed-out run was removed only after confirming its recorded PID no longer existed; subsequent serial and combined validation passed.
acceptedResidualRisks: Validation is from this Windows workspace; macOS and Linux smoke evidence remains a later release-gate task.
The stale-lock cleanup was test-runtime recovery only and does not change product behavior.
